summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of CV landing page for Jhonatan Villalba. Tested all UI improvements including hero layout, round logos, contact sidebar with references, modal functionality, and animations.

design_issues.issue: Scroll fade animations may not be working as expected - cards appear immediately visible rather than fading in on scroll

passed_tests: Hero layout with photo on left (square with rounded corners) and info on right
Round company logos in experience cards (9999px border-radius)
Round institution logos in education cards (9999px border-radius)
Contact sidebar with Referencias Laborales section
Enzo Bavieris and Luis Centurion references displayed correctly
Experience modal with logo watermark background
Education modal with animated logo and watermark background
Made with Emergent badge is hidden
Contact bubble is visible and clickable
Floating icons are smaller and properly positioned (10 small icons found)
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor: Review scroll fade animations implementation using useInView hook - cards may be appearing immediately instead of fading in on scroll. This is a low priority cosmetic issue.
